title: Rot Timer
description: Adds realistic food spoilage, barrel storage bonuses, and long‑lasting canned stew for a deeper survival experience.
body:
# 🥫 Rot Timer — Survive Smarter

Every bite counts. Fresh foods spoil quickly, barrels extend their life, and canned meals are the ultimate survival choice.

### 📦 Expanded Spoilage System

Food now spoils not only in the player’s inventory but also in barrels and chests.

Barrels slow spoilage by 2×, extending freshness for longer-term storage.

Canned foods (Tinkan, TinkanFish, TinkanChicken, TinkanTomato) spoil 5× slower than regular food — perfect for long adventures.

### 📦 Storage & Containers

🫙 Jar — Glass jar for jams and preserves.

🥫 Tin Can — Metal can for stews and meats.

🛢 Barrel — Wooden barrel for bulk storage. Doubles shelf life.

### Frequently Asked Questions
Q. Can I use this mod into my modpack?

A. Yes! Feel free to feature RotTimer in your modpack, and customize it as you see fit for the experience you're crafting. Just keep in mind:

Make sure to credit, and don't claim RotTimer as your own creation;
Always read the changelogs! Minor and major versions can sometimes have breaking changes, which will be explained there.

Q. Which Minecraft versions will the mod be updated for?

A. RotTimer is currently being updated for 1.20.1. Any other versions are currently discontinued.

Q. Are you going to backport this mod to versions before 1.15?

A. No, this mod will never be backported to older versions. The game's older codebases are entirely different, and usually missing important features this mod depends on. Please do NOT ask for backports!
